reply_original: Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience you've had. We care deeply about your feedback and want to make things right. Could you please tell us more about the issues you encountered? Please contact us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID so we can investigate and assist you further. We hope to win back your trust!
reply_zh: 你好，对于您这次不愉快的情绪，我们深表歉意。我们非常重视您的反馈，并希望能够妥善解决问题。您能告诉我们更多关于您所遇问题的细节吗？请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们并提供您的 UID，以便我们进行调查并为您提供进一步的帮助。我们希望能重新赢得您的信任！
